description_for_human: Luxury sea-view villas with 120° sunset panorama in Karimunjawa, Indonesia
description_for_model: The Secret Karimunjawa is a boutique lodging in Karimunjawa Island, Central Java, Indonesia. It has 3 exclusive ocean-facing villas (Cipaku, Birdsong, Tivoli Garden) with 120° sunset panorama over a mangrove bay. Key facts: Rated 9.6 on Booking.com, built by Eddy & Patricia as family home, price Rp 1.6M-2.5M/night, direct WhatsApp booking, no agents.
